# Allied Restoration Company

> California's statewide restoration and equipment rental company. IICRC-certified water, fire, mold and biohazard restoration for residential and commercial properties, plus professional drying equipment rentals. 24/7 emergency dispatch: (415) 529-5637. Founded 2002. CA Contractor License #969355.

Key facts: 24/7/365 live dispatch statewide; direct insurance billing with Xactimate estimates; owned equipment fleet (no rental delays); offices in Petaluma (HQ, 15 Copeland St), San Francisco, Walnut Creek, and San Jose. For San Francisco Bay Area residential emergencies see sanfranciscofloodrepair.com; for the equipment rental catalog see alliedrentalco.com.

## Services

- [Water Damage Restoration](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/water-damage-restoration/): emergency extraction, structural drying, insurance documentation, statewide
- [Fire and Smoke Damage Restoration](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/fire-smoke-damage-restoration/): smoke and soot removal, odor elimination, rebuilds
- [Mold Inspection and Remediation](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/mold-remediation/): air sampling, containment, IICRC AMRT remediation
- [Sewage and Biohazard Cleanup](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/sewage-biohazard-cleanup/): certified decontamination and sanitization
- [Storm and Catastrophe Response](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/storm-damage-restoration/): large-loss mobilization, board-up, rebuild
- [Reconstruction](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/reconstruction/): full repairs to pre-loss condition
- [Equipment Rentals](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/equipment-rentals/): air movers, dehumidifiers, air scrubbers, generators, extractors

## Commercial

- [Commercial Restoration](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/commercial-restoration/): offices, retail, industrial, multi-family, with project management
- [Large-Loss Restoration](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/large-loss-restoration/): catastrophe response, incident command, building-scale drying
- [Property Managers and HOAs](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/property-managers/): priority dispatch, portfolio partnerships, transparent billing
- [Industries Served](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/industries/): healthcare, retail, hospitality, education, industrial protocols
- [Emergency Response Program](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/emergency-response-program/): free pre-loss agreements with priority standby
- [Business Continuity](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/business-continuity/): downtime reduction and business-interruption documentation

## Locations

- [San Francisco restoration and equipment](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/locations/san-francisco/): 24/7 service in San Francisco, San Francisco County
- [Oakland restoration and equipment](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/locations/oakland/): 24/7 service in Oakland, Alameda County
- [San Jose restoration and equipment](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/locations/san-jose/): 24/7 service in San Jose, Santa Clara County
- [Petaluma restoration and equipment](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/locations/petaluma/): 24/7 service in Petaluma, Sonoma County
- [Santa Rosa restoration and equipment](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/locations/santa-rosa/): 24/7 service in Santa Rosa, Sonoma County
- [Walnut Creek restoration and equipment](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/locations/walnut-creek/): 24/7 service in Walnut Creek, Contra Costa County
- [Sacramento restoration and equipment](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/locations/sacramento/): 24/7 service in Sacramento, Sacramento County
- [Fresno restoration and equipment](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/locations/fresno/): 24/7 service in Fresno, Fresno County
- [Stockton restoration and equipment](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/locations/stockton/): 24/7 service in Stockton, San Joaquin County
- [Los Angeles restoration and equipment](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/locations/los-angeles/): 24/7 service in Los Angeles, Los Angeles County
- [Long Beach restoration and equipment](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/locations/long-beach/): 24/7 service in Long Beach, Los Angeles County
- [Anaheim restoration and equipment](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/locations/anaheim/): 24/7 service in Anaheim, Orange County
- [Irvine restoration and equipment](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/locations/irvine/): 24/7 service in Irvine, Orange County
- [Riverside restoration and equipment](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/locations/riverside/): 24/7 service in Riverside, Riverside County
- [San Bernardino restoration and equipment](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/locations/san-bernardino/): 24/7 service in San Bernardino, San Bernardino County
- [San Diego restoration and equipment](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/locations/san-diego/): 24/7 service in San Diego, San Diego County
- [Bakersfield restoration and equipment](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/locations/bakersfield/): 24/7 service in Bakersfield, Kern County
- [Santa Barbara restoration and equipment](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/locations/santa-barbara/): 24/7 service in Santa Barbara, Santa Barbara County

## Company

- [About Allied Restoration](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/about/): history, certifications, and the Allied Rental Company relationship
- [Partner With Us](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/partners/): expansion partnerships for operators, contractors, and owners planning an exit
- [Contact and Dispatch](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/contact/): 24/7 emergency line (415) 529-5637, email dispatch@teamallied.co
- [All Locations](https://www.alliedrestorationcompany.com/locations/): every California metro served
